id.description: The unique numeric ID of the subscriber; increments sequentially.

email.description: The email of the subscriber. Must be unique.

firstName.description: The first name of the subscriber.

lastName.description: The last name of the subscriber.

source.description: The source of the subscriber. Values are: `storefront`, `order`, or `custom`.

orderId.description: The ID of the source order, if source was an order.

consents.description: The collection of consents the shopper is subscribing to.
